[[OpenLieroX]] itself is a clone of [[Liero]]. There are several important Liero clones around.

= Liero clones =
* [[OpenLieroX]]
* [[LieroX]]
* [[Gusanos]]

And many more. See also [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liero Wikipedia about Liero].

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20120321062447/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Liero_clones -->
